chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3848 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 17155/2019 3. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Uzair Qadir Shoro, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Javaid Hussain advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Per learned counsel this matter is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2021 PTD 232. Learned counsel states that the petitioner shall prefer a refund application before the concerned Collectorate pursuant to STGO 4/2024 dated 12.06.2024 and seek remedy on the basis of the aforementioned judgment and any other law that may benefit thereto. He seeks that the application be decided by the respondent department expeditiously, preferably within one month from the date of the application having been filed there before. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
